description_long: This humanoid robot features a rounded, white head with two large, glowing green eyes and a small antenna topped with a red sphere. Its body is compact and angular, with a central torso that connects to a single articulated leg and foot, as well as two long, thin, black arms extending outward. The robot's design is sleek and minimalistic, with visible panel lines and mechanical joints, suggesting a lightweight construction. The arms appear to be segmented and possibly retractable, while the leg is jointed for mobility. The head is expressive, with the eyes dominating the facial area and no visible mouth or nose. The overall appearance is futuristic and functional, suitable for urban environments where agility and visibility are important.
description: A sleek, white humanoid robot with glowing green eyes, a red-tipped antenna, and long, thin black arms. Its compact body and single articulated leg give it a futuristic, agile look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robot's large green eyes, antenna, and both extended black arms.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the robot's segmented arm, back panel details, and the single articulated leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the red-tipped antenna, back of the head, and the full extension of both arms.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the robot's head profile, one green eye, and the mechanical details of the torso and leg.
attribute_pose: The robot is upright with its head facing forward, both long arms extended outward at an upward angle, and its single leg positioned beneath the torso as if ready for movement or balance.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated white and gray panels with black arm segments and minimal decorative elements.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of two large, glowing green eyes set in a smooth, rounded head with no visible mouth or nose; an antenna with a red tip extends from the top.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has two long, segmented arms with visible joints for rotation and extension, and a single articulated leg with at least two hinge joints; limbs appear moderately flexible.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large green optical sensors (eyes) on the head and a possible antenna sensor on top.
